title: Group Forms Strategic Alliance to Advance Global Production of Sustainable Aviation Fuel
content: Avalon Energy Group LLC (â€œAvalonâ€), a U.S.-based developer of integrated sustainable energy projects, and Sulzer Chemtech (â€œSulzerâ€), a global leader in separation and mixing technology, announced the signing of a Strategic Alliance and Partnership Agreement to scale up the production of Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF). Under the agreement, Avalon has selected BioFluxâ„¢ technology for its portfolio of SAF projects currently under development worldwide which will lead to a commercial technology licensing agreement with Sulzer.
